item_name: PeakFlow Insulated Stainless Steel Water Bottle - Vacuum Sealed, Leak-Proof, BPA-Free Sports Bottle
product_description: Stay hydrated wherever you go with the PeakFlow Insulated Water Bottle. Double-wall vacuum insulation keeps drinks ice-cold for up to 24 hours or hot for 12, so your water, coffee, or tea stays exactly how you want it from gym to trail to office. The 18/8 food-grade stainless steel body resists dents and rust, while the powder-coated exterior stays cool to the touch and sweat-free. The leak-proof lid twists on securely for worry-free tossing into a bag, and the wide mouth makes adding ice cubes or cleaning simple. Available in multiple sizes and colors so every member of the family can grab their own. Backed by PeakFlow's 1-year workmanship warranty.
bullet_point1: 24-HOUR COLD, 12-HOUR HOT: Double-wall vacuum insulation locks in temperature all day long
bullet_point2: LEAK-PROOF ON THE GO: Secure twist lid stops spills in your gym bag, backpack, or car cupholder
